content:
AI Reality
The most honest conversation about artificial intelligence happened far away from Silicon Valley.

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Down to earth Ai — The Diesel Depot — Image by BlogginglenThere’s an Engen diesel depot less than a kilometre from were I live.
I’ve been past it hundreds of times. Tankers come and go. Diesel gets pumped. Drivers grab paperwork and head back onto the road. It’s the kind of place that most people never think about when they’re arguing online about artificial intelligence.
Lately, though, I've grown tired of reading the same AI articles.
Every second headline screams that AI is replacing everyone.
Every second LinkedIn post claims you need to "adapt or die."
Everyone has some opinion.
Very few people seem to have actually walked outside and asked someone running a real business what has changed.
So I did.
I introduced myself to the manager, Martin de Preez, and asked one question.
